LightningComponentBundle.description: Runs an autolaunched Flow, shows prompt output (text/HTML/Markdown), copy, expand, print/PDF, and optional Models API thumbs feedback when the flow returns a generation Id.

property.name: cardTitle
property.label: Card title
property.description: Heading shown at the top of the component.

property.name: flowApiName
property.label: Autolaunched Flow API name
property.description: API name of the autolaunched flow.

property.name: recordIdVariableName
property.label: Flow input: record variable
property.description: API name of the Flow Record (single) input variable. Must match your flow exactly (including case). The variable’s object type must match the Lightning page’s object.

property.name: promptResponseVariableName
property.label: Flow output: response variable
property.description: Text output variable to display. If the prompt action uses automatic output, add an Assignment that copies it into this variable.

property.name: generationIdVariableName
property.label: Flow output: generation Id variable
property.description: Optional. Text output variable with the Models API generation Id from your Gen AI step. Assign the Id into this variable in the flow to enable thumbs up/down feedback.

property.name: passRecordIdToFlow
property.label: Pass record to flow
property.description: When true, loads the current record and passes it into the Record input variable above.

property.name: autoExecuteOnLoad
property.label: Auto-run flow on load
property.description: When true, runs the flow once when the page loads.

property.name: heightMode
property.label: Output height
property.description: App Builder only. Values: auto, compact, medium, tall.

property.name: outputFormat
property.label: Output format
property.description: How to render the flow text: auto (detect HTML vs Markdown vs plain), text, html (sanitized rich text), or markdown.

property.name: passRecordIdToFlow
property.label: Pass record to flow
property.description: Usually false on app pages unless your flow expects a record.

property.name: heightMode
property.label: Output height
property.description: App Builder only. Values: auto, compact, medium, tall.

property.name: outputFormat
property.label: Output format
property.description: How to render the flow text: auto (detect), text, html (sanitized rich text), or markdown.

property.name: heightMode
property.label: Output height
property.description: App Builder only. Values: auto, compact, medium, tall.

property.name: outputFormat
property.label: Output format
property.description: How to render the flow text: auto (detect), text, html (sanitized rich text), or markdown.
